question: A good citizen must always ______ the laws of the country to maintain peace.
explanation:
• **Abide by**: To obey or follow a rule/law. ⚖️
• **Back out**: To withdraw from a deal. 🚶‍♂️
• **Fall out**: To argue with someone. 😤
• **Give up**: To stop trying. 🏳️

question: The manager asked the accountant to ______ every rupee spent during the official trip.
explanation:
• **Account for**: To give a reason or explanation for money or behavior. 📝
• **Ask for**: To request. 🙋
• **Look for**: To search. 🕵️
• **Call off**: To cancel. ❌

question: If you need more information about the course, you should ______ the brochure at the front desk.
explanation:
• **Ask for**: To request something specifically. 🙋
• **Ask after**: To inquire about someone's health. 👨‍⚕️
• **Ask out**: To invite someone on a date. ❤️
• **Ask in**: To invite someone inside. 🚪

question: The contractor decided to ______ of the project because the raw material prices doubled.
explanation:
• **Back out**: To withdraw from a promise or agreement. 🚶‍♂️
• **Back up**: To support or copy data. 💾
• **Break down**: To stop functioning. 🚗
• **Call off**: To cancel something planned. ❌

question: I know you are frustrated, but please ______ me for a few more days until the results are out.
explanation:
• **Bear with**: To be patient with someone. ⏳
• **Keep up**: To maintain speed/level. 🏃
• **Hold on**: To wait briefly. ✋
• **Get along**: To be friendly. 👫

question: The child was happy to ______ the candles on his birthday cake.
explanation:
• **Blow out**: To extinguish a flame by blowing. 🎂
• **Blow up**: To explode. 🧨
• **Blow over**: To pass without effect. 🌬️
• **Blow off**: To ignore. 💨

question: The delivery van ______ in the middle of the busy market, causing a huge traffic jam.
explanation:
• **Broke down**: To stop functioning (machinery). 🚗
• **Broke into**: To enter illegally. 🏠
• **Brought up**: To raise a child or topic. 👶
• **Checked out**: To investigate or leave. 🏨

question: The security alarm went off when the thieves tried to ______ the jewelry store.
explanation:
• **Break into**: To enter a building by force (to steal). 🏠
• **Break down**: To fail. 🚗
• **Break up**: To end a relationship. 💔
• **Break out**: To start suddenly (fire/war). 💥

question: During the meeting, the director decided to ______ the topic of budget cuts.
explanation:
• **Bring up**: To mention a topic for discussion. 🗣️
• **Take off**: To depart or remove. 🛫
• **Turn down**: To reject. 👎
• **Call on**: To visit or ask to speak. 🚪

question: The union leaders decided to ______ the strike after a successful negotiation with the CEO.
explanation:
• **Call off**: To cancel a planned event. ❌
• **Call on**: To visit. 🚪
• **Call out**: To shout. 🗣️
• **Call in**: To summon for help. 📞

question: We should ______ our old neighbors while we are in this part of the city.
explanation:
• **Call on**: To pay a brief visit. 🚪
• **Call at**: To stop at a place (bus/train). 🚉
• **Call off**: To cancel. ❌
• **Call up**: To telephone. ☎️

question: Even after the heavy rain started, the farmers decided to ______ with their work.
explanation:
• **Carry on**: To continue doing something. ➡️
• **Fall out**: To argue. 😤
• **Give up**: To surrender/stop. 🏳️
• **Run out of**: To finish supply. 🪫

question: You must ______ of the hotel by 11:00 AM to avoid being charged for another day.
explanation:
• **Check out**: To leave a hotel after paying. 🏨
• **Check in**: To register. 🛄
• **Check up**: To examine health. 🩺
• **Check for**: To search for. 🔎

question: While searching for my old school books, I ______ a photograph of my childhood friends.
explanation:
• **Came across**: To find by chance. 🔍
• **Looked for**: To search actively. 🕵️
• **Accounted for**: To explain. 📝
• **Held on**: To wait/grip. ✋

question: To save money for the new house, the family decided to ______ luxury expenses.
explanation:
• **Cut down on**: To reduce amount/consumption. 📉
• **Break into**: To enter by force. 🏠
• **Keep up with**: To stay level with. 🏃

question: My uncle is a successful businessman who ______ electronics and home appliances.
explanation:
• **Deals in**: To trade in a specific product. 🤝
• **Deals with**: To solve a problem. 🛠️
• **Look after**: To care for. 🏥
• **Bring up**: To raise. 👶

question: The two best friends ______ over a small misunderstanding and haven't spoken for weeks.
explanation:
• **Fell out**: To have an argument and stop being friendly. 😤
• **Get along**: To be friendly. 👫
• **Broke into**: To enter by force. 🏠
• **Came across**: To find by chance. 🔍

question: It is surprisingly easy to ______ with my new roommates because we share the same interests.
explanation:
• **Get along**: To have a friendly relationship. 👫
• **Get by**: To survive/manage. 💵
• **Get over**: To recover. ❤️‍🩹
• **Get through**: To finish. 📞

question: If you find the puzzle too difficult, don't ______; try looking at it from a different angle.
explanation:
• **Give up**: To stop trying. 🏳️
• **Give in**: To surrender to pressure. 🙇
• **Give away**: To reveal/distribute. 🎁
• **Give out**: To stop working/distribute. 💔

question: You should ______ the contract carefully before you sign your name on the dotted line.
explanation:
• **Go through**: To read or examine in detail. 📖
• **Go by**: To follow rules. ⏳
• **Go for**: To choose. 🎯
• **Go off**: To explode. ⏰

question: Please ______ for a minute while I connect your call to the department manager.
explanation:
• **Hold on**: To wait for a short time. ✋
• **Hold back**: To hesitate. 🤐
• **Hold up**: To delay/rob. 🛑
• **Hold out**: To survive. 🛡️

question: The fast-paced changes in technology make it hard for older generations to ______.
explanation:
• **Keep up**: To move/progress at the same rate. 🏃
• **Keep on**: To continue. ➡️
• **Keep away**: To stay distant. 🚫
• **Keep out**: To prevent entry. 🚪

question: Since both parents are working, the grandmother stays home to ______ the baby.
explanation:
• **Look after**: To take care of. 🏥
• **Look down on**: To feel superior to. 🤨
• **Look into**: To investigate. 🔎
• **Look over**: To inspect quickly. 📄

question: I have been ______ my car keys for over an hour, but I still can't find them.
explanation:
• **Looking for**: To try to find something lost. 🕵️
• **Looking into**: To investigate. 🔎
• **Looking after**: To care for. 🏥
• **Looking at**: To observe. 👁️

question: The government has appointed a committee to ______ the causes of the recent gas leak.
explanation:
• **Look into**: To investigate facts. 🔎
• **Look after**: To care for. 🏥
• **Look for**: To search. 🕵️
• **Look through**: To read/examine briefly. 📄

question: We had to ______ our picnic plans because the weather forecast predicted a heavy storm.
explanation:
• **Put off**: To delay or postpone. 🗓️
• **Put up with**: To tolerate. 😠
• **Take off**: To depart. 🛫
• **Check out**: To examine. 🏨

question: I don't know how the residents ______ the constant noise from the nearby construction site.
explanation:
• **Put up with**: To tolerate something unpleasant. 😠
• **Look after**: To care for. 🏥
• **Break into**: To enter illegally. 🏠
• **Deal in**: To trade. 🤝

question: The bakery had to close early because they ______ fresh bread by noon.
explanation:
• **Run out of**: To finish the supply. 🪫
• **Run into**: To meet by chance. 🤝
• **Run down**: To criticize. 🔋
• **Run over**: To hit with a car. 🚔

question: Passengers are requested to remain seated until the aircraft has ______ successfully.
explanation:
• **Take off**: To leave the ground (plane). 🛫
• **Take after**: To resemble. 👨‍👦
• **Break down**: To fail. 🚗
• **Hold on**: To wait. ✋

question: The committee had to ______ the proposal as it was not financially viable.
explanation:
• **Turn down**: To reject or refuse. 👎
• **Turn up**: To arrive/increase volume. 🔊
• **Turn off**: To switch off. 🔌
• **Turn out**: To result. 🏭
